theme.name: Cinematic Youthful Glassmorphism
theme.description: A highly attractive, premium dark mode design relying on cinematic glassmorphism. Uses deep obsidian backgrounds, crystal clear frosted glass panels, and vibrant Coral/Hot Orange and Pirate Gold to pop without resorting to neon.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-[1.1]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12 for bento grids.
layout.grid: Bento Grid (TETRIS Grid) for features. Asymmetrical layouts.
layout.surfaces: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl or 2xl, bg-white/[0.03], border border-white/10. Drop soft ambient shadow.
layout.alignment: Left-align for text and data. Center hero text if necessary. Follow optical alignment.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF5E3A] hover:bg-[#ff7b5c] text-white font-bold px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,94,58,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/10 text-white font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all hover:-translate-y-1

components.cards: Glassmorphic panels with subtle glowing blobs underneath. Hover states should brighten the border to border-white/20.
components.forms: Dark inputs, bg-black/50 with 1px border-white/10, focus state with #FF5E3A ring.
components.navigation: Sticky, high-opacity glassmorphism (bg-[#050505]/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5). Logo left, links center, CTA right.

motion.interactions: Smooth transitions for hover (transform 0.2s ease). Elements fade and slide up on enter (staggered).

images.description: Gaming room with arcade machines. Dark, purple/blue lighting. Use as a background with heavy black/50 overlay.
Electrifying atmosphere at an esports event.
A brightly lit soccer field at night.
Three friends playing pool in a relaxed indoor setting.
Illuminated gaming room with colorful screens.
A lively crowd enjoying a vibrant night performance.

testing.requirement: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based). Examples: data-testid='hero-join-button', data-testid='nav-login-link'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design MUST be full dark mode. Do not use pure white backgrounds anywhere.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for the marketing layouts (Hero, Features, Events, Creator Club). Do not use Shadcn card component for these creative layouts.
Use customized Shadcn UI components for the Dashboards, Forms, and Subscription cards.
Implement glassmorphism using 'bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10' style classes on top of dark gradients.
Do NOT use neon styling. The bright Coral (#FF5E3A) is your accent pop against the deep black.
Inject the gold pirate ship logo consistently in the header, footer, and maybe as an accent mark in the hero.
Set dark mode as default and primary. Ensure text has high contrast (pure white text on dark backgrounds, zinc-300 for paragraphs).
Use framer-motion for bento grid staggered reveals, parallax, and hover effects.
For the hero background, apply a gradient overlay (e.g., bg-black/70 to transparent) so the image is visible but text remains 100% readable.
Bento grids should use wide gaps (gap-6 to gap-8) and mixed span logic (The Hero, The Tall, The Square) as per the TETRIS mode rules.
